understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based level, modifying a carried piece's shape, color, and rotation using modifier tiles so that it matches the requirements of one or more goal cells, then stepping onto the activated goal cells to complete them. Completing all goals in a level advances to the next, and winning all levels completes the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game involves moving a piece on a grid. The piece has three attributes: shape, color, and rotation. Goal cells require a specific combination of these attributes to be activated. Modifier tiles on the grid change the piece's attributes when stepped on: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. A goal cell becomes 'ACTIVATED' when the piece's attributes match its requirements, and stepping onto an activated goal completes it. Each move consumes stamina; losing all stamina costs a life, and losing all lives ends the game. In the played episode, the goal at [34,10] was already activated, but the player repeatedly moved north and south without stepping onto the goal cell to complete it, indicating a need to move onto the activated goal's coordinates to progress.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based level, modifying a carried piece's shape, color, and rotation using modifier tiles so that it matches the requirements of one or more goal cells, then stepping onto the activated goal cells to complete them. Completing all goals in a level advances to the next, and winning all levels completes the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game involves moving a piece on a grid. The piece has three attributes: shape, color, and rotation. Goal cells require a specific combination of these attributes to be activated. Modifier tiles on the grid change the piece's attributes when stepped on: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. A goal cell becomes 'ACTIVATED' when the piece's attributes match its requirements, and stepping onto an activated goal completes it. Each move consumes stamina; losing all stamina costs a life, and losing all lives ends the game. In the played episode, the goal at [34,10] was already activated, but the player repeatedly moved north and south without stepping onto the goal cell to complete it, indicating a need to move onto the activated goal's coordinates to progress.
